charlatan v0.4.1.92
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create fake phone numbers

Source: R/phone_number.R
ch_phone_number.Rd

Create fake phone numbers

ch_phone_number(n = 1, locale = NULL)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer
locale

(character) the locale to use. See PhoneNumberProvider$new()$allowed_locales() for locales supported (default: en_US)

See also

PhoneNumberProvider

Examples

ch_phone_number()

#> [1] "1-099-341-8291"
ch_phone_number(10)

#>  [1] "(173)808-3773x4588" "1-754-008-1753x533" "480-713-7534x310"  
#>  [4] "+48(8)9875859613"   "483-755-9228x750"   "190-857-1253x198"  
#>  [7] "123-699-7656x5877"  "1-894-074-4525"     "900.884.0171x799"  
#> [10] "(964)926-0138"     
ch_phone_number(500)

#>   [1] "133-093-1193x43877"   "(845)148-1000"        "407.452.4823x40797"  
#>   [4] "+71(8)5517917547"     "616-116-0890"         "(509)860-2757x072"   
#>   [7] "350.682.6560x74812"   "(901)692-7153x55126"  "029.405.1833x32379"  
#>  [10] "562-277-7611"         "1-439-528-5566"       "472-665-4601x67517"  
#>  [13] "032.371.5478"         "1-836-645-2745"       "1-917-593-3655x872"  
#>  [16] "011-656-2700"         "(547)058-9139x7975"   "(509)783-1931x139"   
#>  [19] "(709)246-1426x53347"  "(801)413-2241x28569"  "00422976848"         
#>  [22] "1-218-256-7469x0423"  "1-831-665-4818"       "(176)387-1335x40038" 
#>  [25] "141.061.4804x9921"    "1-221-621-7622"       "790.168.1003x2844"   
#>  [28] "+55(3)2354703454"     "04415501722"          "592-430-8960x454"    
#>  [31] "117-260-4620x53620"   "811-283-5450"         "1-927-243-2857x6861" 
#>  [34] "939-082-3834"         "(548)414-5916"        "1-021-866-2619"      
#>  [37] "(499)412-9348"        "092-337-0304x7914"    "1-960-180-2326x867"  
#>  [40] "(494)062-3665"        "07934456869"          "06198752253"         
#>  [43] "574.866.2862x61880"   "574.176.4831"         "300.262.3752"        
#>  [46] "461-501-6385x8778"    "995.022.7841"         "1-782-585-5570x563"  
#>  [49] "127.739.7540"         "041.436.9794x8017"    "02246789891"         
#>  [52] "023.044.0426x31068"   "425.140.5219x6121"    "(851)487-1573x02006" 
#>  [55] "1-237-118-7424"       "889.840.0069"         "1-406-606-2712x847"  
#>  [58] "09181370348"          "683.595.8367"         "1-654-897-9982x403"  
#>  [61] "780.221.0004x9281"    "+58(9)3771521940"     "213.777.8624"        
#>  [64] "134.117.1568"         "1-432-009-4980"       "949.338.0913"        
#>  [67] "846.874.8041x05238"   "597.096.8145"         "101-491-5368"        
#>  [70] "1-532-133-9802x141"   "07191475069"          "1-168-446-5096x9815" 
#>  [73] "1-232-804-6879"       "240.226.1260x26456"   "05972109286"         
#>  [76] "096-012-9951x7571"    "1-913-766-0835"       "+51(2)0257493749"    
#>  [79] "295-850-1748x6517"    "792.400.3727x3044"    "09827281615"         
#>  [82] "(414)358-2887"        "02615361796"          "05524495123"         
#>  [85] "846.890.3477x484"     "1-888-161-2737x8398"  "1-470-071-2460x2893" 
#>  [88] "039.248.1762x5315"    "(210)988-4848x51134"  "(726)720-3195"       
#>  [91] "208.116.2817"         "991.913.7509"         "(988)302-1521x74050" 
#>  [94] "825.450.0873x641"     "544.738.8120x906"     "815-213-2759x18795"  
#>  [97] "(278)831-9463"        "1-047-798-1274x496"   "541-959-7481"        
#> [100] "1-955-289-0497"       "1-550-243-9882x05568" "(993)542-9857x61008" 
#> [103] "109.769.9570x13084"   "(518)284-1505"        "+88(4)8950806198"    
#> [106] "862.462.8159x909"     "876-362-1567x1196"    "(961)113-6228"       
#> [109] "1-953-394-5268x46204" "415.735.9395"         "729.823.7207x695"    
#> [112] "(601)288-5003"        "1-863-063-4603x8860"  "088.391.4096x650"    
#> [115] "762.393.0611"         "1-061-773-4539x65021" "1-720-923-9199"      
#> [118] "+35(9)1721689069"     "1-527-024-9366"       "1-342-059-9573x6129" 
#> [121] "(260)300-7472"        "1-638-347-2290x82714" "1-063-639-9452"

#> [127] "478-312-5988x487"     "260.651.1838x8025"    "458.560.7454"        
#> [130] "717.938.3082"         "243.133.2450"         "(930)869-7099"       
#> [133] "1-101-291-1049x04042" "437.667.0286x1072"    "1-695-600-2709x6545" 
#> [136] "00435236356"          "251-973-7102"         "998-254-3315"

# locales
ch_phone_number(locale = "fr_FR")

#> [1] "03 35 43 60 71"
ch_phone_number(locale = "uk_UA")

#> [1] "043 230-33-81"
ch_phone_number(locale = "en_CA")

#> [1] "449 777 4857"
ch_phone_number(locale = "lv_LV")

#> [1] "+37133589060"
